title: AmCache
overview: AmCache is a valuable Windows artifact that records metadata about program execution and installations. It helps forensic investigators track program usage across different Windows versions starting from Windows 7.

study.overview: AmCache is a valuable Windows artifact that records metadata about program execution and installations. It helps forensic investigators track program usage across different Windows versions starting from Windows 7.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
